plugins.name: team-kit
plugins.description: CI, code review, shipping, and test-reliability skills + subagents. Ported from the Cursor Team Kit.

plugins.name: continual-learning
plugins.description: Incrementally learns durable preferences and workspace facts from session transcripts and keeps CLAUDE.md current. Ported from the Cursor continual-learning plugin.

plugins.name: thermos
plugins.description: Thermo-nuclear branch review: deep correctness + security audits, a harsh maintainability rubric, and a thermos orchestrator that runs both review subagents in parallel. Ported from the Cursor Thermos plugin.

plugins.name: pr-review-canvas
plugins.description: Render a GitHub PR review as an interactive, self-contained HTML walkthrough with categorized files, annotations, and moved-code-aware diffs. Ported from the Cursor PR Review Canvas plugin.

plugins.name: docs-canvas
plugins.description: Render documentation as a navigable, self-contained HTML page with a sticky table of contents, sections, callouts, and code blocks. Ported from the Cursor Docs Canvas plugin.
